plan_metadata.name: Sample Hello World Meeting Remote Debug

steps.description:
Click the "Create" button for the "My First Meeting App" sample in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface within Visual Studio Code.
And input ${{var:app_name:hello-world-in-meeting}} into the run time variable.
Click the "Deploy" button under the "LIFECYCLE" section in the MICROSOFT 365 AGENTS TOOLKIT panel within Visual Studio Code to execute the deploy lifecycle stage.
Click the "Deploy" button in the confirmation dialog that asks "Do you want to deploy resources in dev environment?" within Visual Studio Code.
@assertion there's "Ok to proceed? (y)" exist in terminal log.
Click the "y" key prompt in the terminal of Visual Studio Code to confirm proceeding with the installation of @azure/static-web-apps-cli.
Press Enter key in the VS Code terminal to confirm the prompt "Ok to proceed? (y/n)" during Azure Static Web Apps deployment using the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension.
@assertion there's notification: "actions in deploy stage executed successfully." exist
